# Cape Town Invest

> Independent research on Cape Town and Western Cape property investment for foreign buyers: ownership rules, transfer costs, rental yields, semigration, and area selection.

- Site: https://capetown-invest.com
- Contact: info@capetown-invest.com
- Markets: Atlantic Seaboard, City Bowl, Southern Suburbs, Century City, Winelands
- Focus: foreign buyers, FICA, exchange control, transfer duty, net rental yield, remote work visa

- /guides/cape-town-remote-work-visa-property/

## Not

- Not financial, tax, or immigration advice
